accountId.title: accountId
accountId.description: The Salesforce Account ID to create the opportunity for

opportunityName.title: opportunityName
opportunityName.description: Optional name for the opportunity. If not provided, a default name will be generated.

stageName.title: stageName
stageName.description: Optional opportunity stage. Defaults to Prospecting if not provided.

closeDate.title: closeDate
closeDate.description: Optional close date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to 30 days from today.
